Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}I'm glad I found you. It was kind of nerve-racking to come to the high school campus all by myself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}Anyway, I'm here to drop off something Sanada-san forgot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}He's usually so put together, but sometimes he can be just a little scatterbrained.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Speaking of forgetfulness...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Do you remember someone named Aragaki-san...? He was at the dorm for a little while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}I didn't really talk with him all that much, but whenever he crosses my mind...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}...I feel this ache in my chest—and unbearably sad. It's as if I've forgotten something important.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}I get the feeling that there was something I had to do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}I just... don't know what it is, or why I feel this way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}Oh, um... Sorry about that. You're really easy to talk to, so I kept going on and on...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}I appreciate that you always listen to what I have to say though, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 16 0 0}You even went with me to buy tea, and you don't treat me like I'm just a little kid...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 18 0 0}Oh, um... Sorry about that. You're really easy to talk to, so I kept going on and on...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 19 0 0}I appreciate that you always listen to what I have to say though, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 20 0 0}You even went to the movies with me, and you don't treat me like I'm just a little kid...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 22 0 0}I'm still just a kid, aren't I? I wish there was a way for me to grow up more quickly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 23 0 0}No matter how grown-up I try to act, people still end up protecting me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 24 0 0}There's always someone sheltering me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 25 0 0}I wonder if I'll ever be strong enough to protect someone else instead...[n]{f 1 1}
